Project.name: LLM-VM Development
Project.description: Core LLM-VM project for semantic XPath execution and dense retrieval

Task.title: Implement Semantic XPath Executor
Task.description: Build the dense xpath executor with semantic matching capabilities for tree-structured data

SubTask.title: Add Entailment Scoring
SubTask.description: Integrate BART-based entailment classifier for semantic predicate matching

SubTask.title: Add Cosine Scoring
SubTask.description: Implement TAS-B embedding similarity for fast semantic matching

SubTask.title: Implement Range Indexing
SubTask.description: Support range syntax like [1:3] and [-2:] for batch node selection

Task.title: Multi-Domain Support
Task.description: Extend the system to support multiple domains beyond itinerary like todolist

SubTask.title: Create Schema Loader
SubTask.description: Build flexible schema loading system from YAML configuration files

SubTask.title: Dynamic Prompt Loading
SubTask.description: Modify XPath query generator to load prompts based on active schema

Task.title: Documentation
Task.description: Write comprehensive documentation for the LLM-VM system

SubTask.title: API Documentation
SubTask.description: Document all public APIs and their usage examples

SubTask.title: Architecture Guide
SubTask.description: Write high-level architecture overview and design decisions

Project.name: Frontend Dashboard
Project.description: Web-based dashboard for visualizing and interacting with the LLM-VM system

Task.title: Design UI Components
Task.description: Create reusable React components for the dashboard interface

SubTask.title: Tree Visualization
SubTask.description: Build interactive tree view component for displaying XML structure

SubTask.title: Query Input Panel
SubTask.description: Create input panel for natural language queries with syntax highlighting

SubTask.title: Results Display
SubTask.description: Design results panel showing matched nodes with scores and reasoning

Task.title: Backend Integration
Task.description: Connect frontend to the Python backend via REST API

SubTask.title: API Client
SubTask.description: Implement TypeScript client for backend communication

SubTask.title: WebSocket Support
SubTask.description: Add real-time updates for long-running queries via WebSocket

Project.name: Research
Project.description: Research tasks for improving semantic matching accuracy and performance

Task.title: Benchmark Scoring Methods
Task.description: Compare entailment, cosine, and LLM-based scoring on various datasets

SubTask.title: Create Test Dataset
SubTask.description: Build labeled dataset with semantic queries and expected matches

SubTask.title: Run Experiments
SubTask.description: Execute benchmarks across all scoring methods and record metrics

SubTask.title: Analyze Results
SubTask.description: Statistical analysis of precision, recall, and latency trade-offs

Task.title: Explore New Embeddings
Task.description: Evaluate newer embedding models for improved semantic matching

SubTask.title: Test BGE Models
SubTask.description: Evaluate BAAI BGE embedding models for semantic similarity

SubTask.title: Test E5 Models
SubTask.description: Evaluate Microsoft E5 embedding models performance

Project.name: Personal
Project.description: Personal tasks and reminders not related to work projects

Task.title: Weekly Review
Task.description: Review weekly progress and plan next week's priorities

SubTask.title: Review Completed Tasks
SubTask.description: Go through all completed tasks and note achievements

SubTask.title: Update Priorities
SubTask.description: Reassess and update task priorities based on new information

Task.title: Learn Rust
Task.description: Study Rust programming language for systems development

SubTask.title: Complete Rustlings
SubTask.description: Finish all exercises in the Rustlings course

SubTask.title: Build CLI Tool
SubTask.description: Create a small command-line tool to practice Rust
